creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 167696
v1

Firefox 45 / 38.7 is going to bundle graphite2-1.3.6. Until MFSAs are published the impact is a bit unclear but follow URL or See Also for more details. It'd be nice if the system version doesn't fall behind leaving www/firefox et al. vulnerable.

Build tested on 9.3R i386, 9.3R amd64, 10.1R i386, 10.2 amd64. No API/ABI changes -> MFH candidate.

ABI check: https://people.freebsd.org/~jbeich/compat_reports/graphite2/1.3.5_to_1.3.6/compat_report.html
